commands: Review latest GitHub Actions for current main
Run npm run test:integration with local Supabase where relevant
Perform physical-iPhone haptic validation before claiming sensory acceptance

nextAction: Read docs/roadmap/HAPTIC_LANGUAGE_IMPLEMENTATION.md, inspect current haptic dependencies and preference-storage patterns, then implement the semantic haptic service as the first coherent commit.
risks: Haptics could be mistaken for remote consent or another person's presence if semantics are not carefully constrained.
Simulator-only testing cannot validate recognizability, comfort, intensity, or timing on a physical iPhone.
Playback failure must never delay or undo Soft Signal or emergency-stop state transitions.
The integrated current main has not been represented here as fully verified on a physical iPhone.
Learning completion must never be interpreted as evidence of safety or consent competence.
notes: Repository artifacts are the source of truth; prior chat context is optional context only.
HAPTIC-001 is explicitly authorized for autonomous implementation after this documentation branch is merged.
The first slice is limited to presence, attention, confirmation, softSignal, and emergencyStop semantic events.
No custom Core Haptics waveform work is authorized unless the Expo-compatible path is documented as insufficient.
